daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are soft today, Virgo. Your nervous system wants to chill—lean into slow mornings and intentional choices. This is your moment to trust the process without overthinking every detail.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the quiet confidence you've been building. Whether single or coupled, your energy is magnetic today. Don't dim yourself trying to fit their expectations—authenticity is your love language right now.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off in unexpected ways. A project or conversation you thought was finished might circle back with better energy. Stay open to collaboration and let others contribute their piece.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move if it feels good, rest if it doesn't—there's no wrong answer. Hydration and time outside will shift your whole frequency. Trust what your intuition suggests.

weekly.overview: Mercury's got your back this week, Virgo. You're in a reflective mood, and honestly? That's your superpower right now. Trust the quiet moments—they're organizing your next move before you even realize it.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your energy shifts. Whether you're coupled up or exploring, this week invites authentic conversations. Stop overanalyzing every text and just feel it out. Vulnerability looks good on you.
weekly.career: Your attention to detail is about to become someone's game-changer. A project or conversation you thought was settled might circle back—and that's actually the universe giving you a second chance to set new boundaries.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for rest, not another optimization hack. Try grounding practices that don't require a plan: walks, tea, sitting with your thoughts. Your body's wisdom is louder than usual.
